messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Write a python-pptx script creating a 25-slide corporate presentation for the Compliance Department detailing an Annual Risk Assessment. Use strict table layouts and line charts for risk trends. Save as "Risk_Assessment.pptx". All text must be in English, formatted to fit a 16:9 Widescreen slide size orientation. Do not use any external APIs, web scraping, or internet access to fetch data or assets; all content and logic must be generated purely within the script. When creating charts, you must strictly use XL_CHART_TYPE from the library; do not import or use ChartType from pptx.enum.chart. Before setting text on a title shape, always verify that slide.shapes.title is not None first to prevent errors. Your response must be structured with distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections. All Python code must be enclosed in ```python fences, and all non-code text must be enclosed in ```text fences.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
import os


SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.33)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

PRIMARY_COLOR = RGBColor(0x1B, 0x2A, 0x4A)
ACCENT_COLOR = RGBColor(0x00, 0x77, 0xB6)
SECONDARY_BLUE = RGBColor(0x00, 0x5F, 0x8D)
LIGHT_GRAY = RGBColor(0xF5, 0xF7, 0xFA)
WHITE = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF)
BLACK = RGBColor(0x33, 0x33, 0x33)
DARK_TEXT = RGBColor(0x2C, 0x2C, 0x2C)
MEDIUM_GRAY = RGBColor(0x6B, 0x7B, 0x8D)

RISK_RED = RGBColor(0xE6, 0x39, 0x46)
RISK_AMBER = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xB7, 0x03)
RISK_GREEN = RGBColor(0x2D, 0xC6, 0x53)

FONT_PRIMARY = "Aptos"
FONT_FALLBACK = "Calibri"


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = RGBColor(*color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False,
                 color=DARK_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT, font_name=FONT_PRIMARY):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = color
    run.font.name = font_name
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title_text, body_text="",
             bg_color=WHITE, border_color=None):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    if border_color:
        shape.line.color.rgb = border_color
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)
    else:
        shape.line.fill.background()

    tf = shape.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = title_text
    run.font.size = Pt(14)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = PRIMARY_COLOR
    run.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY

    if body_text:
        p2 = tf.add_paragraph()
        run2 = p2.add_run()
        run2.text = body_text
        run2.font.size = Pt(11)
        run2.font.color.rgb = MEDIUM_GRAY
        run2.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, left, top, text, font_size=24, color=PRIMARY_COLOR):
    return add_text_box(slide, left, top, Inches(10), Inches(0.8), text,
                        font_size=font_size, bold=True, color=color)


def add_footer(slide, slide_num, total=25):
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(6.3), Inches(7.0), Inches(0.7), Inches(0.4),
                 str(slide_num), font_size=9, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY
        shape.line.color.rgb = MEDIUM_GRAY
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.3), width - Inches(0.4),
                     height - Inches(0.6), "Image Placeholder", font_size=12, color=MEDIUM_GRAY,
                     alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_table(slide, rows, cols, data, left, top, width, height, header_color=PRIMARY_COLOR):
    table_shape = slide.shapes.add_table(rows, cols, left, top, width, height)
    table = table_shape.table

    for col_idx in range(cols):
        cell = table.cell(0, col_idx)
        cell.text = data[0][col_idx] if rows > 0 else ""
        for paragraph in cell.text_frame.paragraphs:
            paragraph.font.size = Pt(10)
            paragraph.font.bold = True
            paragraph.font.color.rgb = WHITE
            paragraph.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY
        cell.fill.solid()
        cell.fill.fore_color.rgb = header_color

    for row_idx in range(1, rows):
        for col_idx in range(cols):
            cell = table.cell(row_idx, col_idx)
            cell.text = data[row_idx][col_idx] if len(data) > row_idx and len(data[row_idx]) > col_idx else ""
            for paragraph in cell.text_frame.paragraphs:
                paragraph.font.size = Pt(9)
                paragraph.font.color.rgb = DARK_TEXT
                paragraph.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY
            if row_idx % 2 == 0:
                cell.fill.solid()
                cell.fill.fore_color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY

    return table_shape


def _build_category_chart(chart_dict):
    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    cat_data = CategoryChartData()
    for c in chart_dict['categories']:
        cat_data.add_category(c)
    for name, values in chart_dict['series']:
        cat_data.add_series(name, tuple(values))
    return cat_data


def add_line_chart(slide, chart_data, title_text, left, top, width, height):
    if isinstance(chart_data, dict):
        chart_data = _build_category_chart(chart_data)
    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.LINE_MARKERS, left, top, width, height, chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    if chart.has_title:
        chart.chart_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].text = title_text
        chart.chart_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(12)
        chart.chart_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = True
        chart.chart_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = PRIMARY_COLOR

    plot = chart.plots[0]
    for series in plot.series:
        series.format.line.width = Pt(2)
        series.has_data_labels = False

    value_axis = chart.value_axis
    value_axis.has_title = True
    if value_axis.has_title:
        value_axis.axis_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].text = "Risk Score"
        value_axis.axis_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(9)

    cat_axis = chart.category_axis
    cat_axis.tick_labels.font.size = Pt(8)

    return chart_frame


def slide_01_title(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, (PRIMARY_COLOR))
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.5), Inches(1.5), Inches(8.3), Inches(1.0),
                 "Annual Risk Assessment", font_size=40, bold=True, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.5), Inches(2.6), Inches(8.3), Inches(0.6),
                 "FY 2024 — Compliance Department", font_size=22, bold=False, color=ACCENT_COLOR, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.5), Inches(4.0), Inches(8.3), Inches(0.5),
                 "Prepared by: Risk & Compliance Division", font_size=14, bold=False, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.5), Inches(4.6), Inches(8.3), Inches(0.5),
                 "Date: December 2024", font_size=14, bold=False, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(5.5), Inches(3.3), Inches(2.3), Inches(0.06))
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_COLOR
    add_footer(slide, 1)


def slide_02_executive_summary(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, (WHITE))
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Executive Summary"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.3), Inches(10), Inches(0.6),
                     "Executive Summary", font_size=28, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_COLOR)

    add_card(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.2), Inches(5.5), Inches(4.5),
             "Overview",
             "The FY 2024 Annual Risk Assessment evaluated enterprise-wide risk exposure across financial, operational, compliance, cybersecurity, and market domains. The assessment identified 47 active risks, with 8 classified as high severity requiring immediate mitigation action.")

    add_card(slide, Inches(6.5), Inches(1.2), Inches(6.0), Inches(2.0),
             "Key Findings",
             "\u2022 Overall risk posture: Moderate\n\u2022 High-severity risks: 8 (up from 5 in FY23)\n\u2022 Compliance incidents: 12 total\n\u2022 Cybersecurity threats increased by 23%")

    add_card(slide, Inches(6.5), Inches(3.4), Inches(6.0), Inches(2.3),
             "Top Priorities",
             "\u2022 Strengthen cybersecurity controls\n\u2022 Enhance regulatory compliance framework\n\u2022 Implement automated risk monitoring\n\u2022 Expand employee training programs")

    add_footer(slide, 2)


def slide_03_agenda(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, (WHITE))
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Agenda"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.3), Inches(10), Inches(0.6),
                     "Agenda", font_size=28, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_COLOR)

    topics = [
        ("01", "Risk Assessment Methodology"),
        ("02", "Regulatory Landscape"),
        ("03", "Financial Risk Analysis"),
        ("04", "Operational & Compliance Risks"),
        ("05", "Cybersecurity Threats"),
        ("06", "Mitigation Strategies & KPIs"),
    ]

    for i, (num, topic) in enumerate(topics):
        col = i % 2
        row = i // 2
        x = Inches(1.5 + col * 5.8)
        y = Inches(1.3 + row * 1.9)
        add_card(slide, x, y, Inches(4.8), Inches(1.5), topic, num, LIGHT_GRAY, ACCENT_COLOR)

    add_footer(slide, 3)


def slide_04_methodology(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, (WHITE))
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Risk Assessment Methodology"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.3), Inches(10), Inches(0.6),
                     "Risk Assessment Methodology", font_size=28, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_COLOR)

    steps = [
        ("Step 1: Identify Risks", "Systematic identification of risks across all business units and functional areas"),
        ("Step 2: Assess Likelihood", "Evaluate probability using historical data and expert judgment on a 5-point scale"),
        ("Step 3: Evaluate Impact", "Measure potential financial, operational, and reputational impact severity"),
        ("Step 4: Calculate Risk Score", "Combine likelihood and impact to derive composite risk scores for prioritization"),
    ]

    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(steps):
        x = Inches(0.8 + i * 3.1)
        y = Inches(1.2)
        add_card(slide, x, y, Inches(2.7), Inches(4.5), title, body, LIGHT_GRAY, ACCENT_COLOR)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(6.0), Inches(11), Inches(0.5),
                 "Risk Score = Likelihood (1-5) x Impact (1-5)", font_size=12, bold=True, color=ACCENT_COLOR, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, 4)


def slide_05_framework(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, (WHITE))
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Risk Framework Overview"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.3), Inches(10), Inches(0.6),
                     "Risk Framework Overview", font_size=28, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_COLOR)

    categories = [
        ("Financial Risk", ACCENT_COLOR),
        ("Operational Risk", SECONDARY_BLUE),
        ("Compliance Risk", PRIMARY_COLOR),
        ("Cybersecurity Risk", RISK_RED),
        ("Market Risk", RISK_AMBER),
    ]

    for i, (cat_name, color) in enumerate(categories):
        x = Inches(0.8 + i * 2.5)
        y = Inches(1.3)
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, x, y, Inches(1.6), Inches(1.6))
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = color
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.15), y + Inches(0.4), Inches(1.3), Inches(0.8),
                     cat_name, font_size=11, bold=True, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    for i in range(len(categories) - 1):
        x1 = Inches(2.4 + i * 2.5)
        y1 = Inches(2.0)
        line_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RIGHT_ARROW, x1, y1, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3))
        line_shape.fill.solid()
        line_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = MEDIUM_GRAY

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(3.5), Inches(11), Inches(0.4),
                 "Integrated Risk Management Framework — COSO ERM Aligned", font_size=16, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_COLOR, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(4.2), Inches(11), Inches(3.0),
                 "The framework integrates risk identification, assessment, mitigation, and monitoring across all organizational levels.\n"
                 "Each category is evaluated quarterly with annual comprehensive review by the Risk Committee.", font_size=12, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    add_footer(slide, 5)


def slide_06_regulatory(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, (WHITE))
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Regulatory Landscape"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.3), Inches(10), Inches(0.6),
                     "Regulatory Landscape", font_size=28, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_COLOR)

    data = [
        ["Regulation", "Scope", "Impact Level", "Status"],
        ["SOX Compliance", "Financial Reporting", "High", "Compliant"],
        ["GDPR / Data Privacy", "Data Protection", "High", "Under Review"],
        ["PCI-DSS", "Payment Security", "Medium", "Compliant"],
        ["HIPAA", "Healthcare Data", "High", "Compliant"],
        ["Basel III", "Capital Adequacy", "Medium", "Compliant"],
        ["AML / KYC", "Anti-Money Laundering", "High", "Enhanced"],
        ["ISO 27001", "Information Security", "Medium", "Certified"],
    ]

    add_table(slide, len(data), 4, data, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.2), Inches(11.5), Inches(3.5))

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(5.0), Inches(11), Inches(0.4),
                 "6 of 7 regulations fully compliant; GDPR review initiated Q4 2024", font_size=12, bold=True, color=RISK_AMBER)

    add_footer(slide, 6)


def slide_07_categories(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, (WHITE))
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Key Risk Categories"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.3), Inches(10), Inches(0.6),
                     "Key Risk Categories", font_size=28, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_COLOR)

    categories = [
        ("Financial Risks", "47% of total risk exposure", ACCENT_COLOR),
        ("Operational Risks", "23% of total risk exposure", SECONDARY_BLUE),
        ("Compliance Risks", "15% of total risk exposure", PRIMARY_COLOR),
        ("Cybersecurity Risks", "10% of total risk exposure", RISK_RED),
        ("Market Risks", "5% of total risk exposure", RISK_AMBER),
    ]

    for i, (name, desc, color) in enumerate(categories):
        x = Inches(0.8 + i * 2.5)
        y = Inches(1.3)
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x, y, Inches(2.1), Inches(4.0))
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = color
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(0.3), Inches(1.7), Inches(0.5),
                     name, font_size=14, bold=True, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(1.8), Inches(1.7), Inches(1.5),
                     desc, font_size=11, bold=False, color=RGBColor(0xCC, 0xCC, 0xCC), alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, 7)


def slide_08_financial_risks(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, (WHITE))
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Financial Risks Overview"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.3), Inches(10), Inches(0.6),
                     "Financial Risks Overview", font_size=28, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_COLOR)

    metrics = [
        ("Credit Risk", "Exposure to counterparty defaults and loan losses"),
        ("Liquidity Risk", "Ability to meet short-term financial obligations"),
        ("Market Risk", "Impact of market price fluctuations on portfolio"),
        ("Interest Rate Risk", "Sensitivity to changes in interest rate environment"),
    ]

    for i, (name, desc) in enumerate(metrics):
        x = Inches(0.8 + i * 3.1)
        y = Inches(1.2)
        add_card(slide, x, y, Inches(2.7), Inches(4.5), name, desc, LIGHT_GRAY, ACCENT_COLOR)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(6.0), Inches(11), Inches(0.5),
                 "Total financial risk exposure: $2.3B | Credit risk concentration: 34% of portfolio", font_size=12, bold=True, color=RISK_AMBER)

    add_footer(slide, 8)


def slide_09_financial_trends(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, (WHITE))
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Financial Risk Trends"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.3), Inches(10), Inches(0.6),
                     "Financial Risk Trends", font_size=28, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_COLOR)

    chart_data = {
        'categories': ['FY 2022', 'FY 2023', 'FY 2024'],
        'series': [
            ('Credit Risk Score', [65, 72, 78]),
            ('Liquidity Risk Score', [45, 50, 55]),
            ('Market Risk Score', [80, 75, 70]),
        ]
    }

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.LINE_MARKERS, Inches(1.0), Inches(1.2), Inches(11.3), Inches(4.5),
        _build_category_chart(chart_data))
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    if chart.has_title:
        chart.chart_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].text = "Financial Risk Scores (FY 2022-2024)"
        chart.chart_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(12)

    plot = chart.plots[0]
    for series in plot.series:
        series.format.line.width = Pt(2.5)
        series.has_data_labels = True
        series.data_labels.font.size = Pt(8)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(6.0), Inches(11), Inches(0.4),
                 "Credit risk trending upward; Market risk declining due to hedging strategies", font_size=12, bold=True, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    add_footer(slide, 9)


def slide_10_operational_risks(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, (WHITE))
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Operational Risks Overview"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.3), Inches(10), Inches(0.6),
                     "Operational Risks Overview", font_size=28, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_COLOR)

    risks = [
        ("Process Failure", "Errors in business processes and workflows"),
        ("Human Error", "Mistakes due to inadequate training or fatigue"),
        ("System Outage", "Technology infrastructure failures"),
        ("Vendor Risk", "Third-party service provider dependencies"),
    ]

    for i, (name, desc) in enumerate(risks):
        x = Inches(0.8 + i * 3.1)
        y = Inches(1.2)
        add_card(slide, x, y, Inches(2.7), Inches(4.5), name, desc, LIGHT_GRAY, SECONDARY_BLUE)

    add_footer(slide, 10)


def slide_11_operational_trends(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, (WHITE))
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Operational Risk Trends"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.3), Inches(10), Inches(0.6),
                     "Operational Risk Trends", font_size=28, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_COLOR)

    chart_data = {
        'categories': ['Q1', 'Q2', 'Q3', 'Q4'],
        'series': [
            ('Process Incidents', [15, 12, 9, 7]),
            ('System Outages (hrs)', [8, 6, 4, 3]),
            ('Vendor Issues', [5, 7, 6, 4]),
        ]
    }

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.LINE_MARKERS, Inches(1.0), Inches(1.2), Inches(11.3), Inches(4.5),
        _build_category_chart(chart_data))
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    if chart.has_title:
        chart.chart_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].text = "Operational Incidents by Quarter"
        chart.chart_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(12)

    plot = chart.plots[0]
    for series in plot.series:
        series.format.line.width = Pt(2.5)
        series.has_data_labels = True
        series.data_labels.font.size = Pt(8)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(6.0), Inches(11), Inches(0.4),
                 "Operational incidents decreased 53% year-over-year", font_size=12, bold=True, color=RISK_GREEN)

    add_footer(slide, 11)


def slide_12_compliance_risks(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, (WHITE))
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Compliance & Regulatory Risks"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.3), Inches(10), Inches(0.6),
                     "Compliance & Regulatory Risks", font_size=28, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_COLOR)

    data = [
        ["Area", "Requirement", "Status", "Risk Level"],
        ["AML Reporting", "Suspicious Activity Reports", "On Track", "Low"],

def slide_15_heat_map(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, (WHITE))
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Risk Heat Map"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.3), Inches(10), Inches(0.6),
                     "Risk Heat Map", font_size=28, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_COLOR)

    colors = [
        (RISK_GREEN, RISK_AMBER, RISK_RED),
        (RISK_GREEN, RISK_AMBER, RISK_RED),
        (RISK_GREEN, RISK_AMBER, RISK_RED),
    ]
    labels = ["Low", "Medium", "High"]

    for row in range(3):
        for col in range(3):
            x = Inches(2.5 + col * 2.8)
            y = Inches(1.5 + (2 - row) * 1.6)
            shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x, y, Inches(2.4), Inches(1.3))
            shape.fill.solid()
            shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = colors[row][col]

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(6.8), Inches(1.5), Inches(0.4), "Likelihood", font_size=12, bold=True, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(7.5), Inches(0.3), Inches(1.5), Inches(0.4), "Impact", font_size=12, bold=True, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    for i in range(3):
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.8 + i * 2.8), Inches(6.7), Inches(2.5), Inches(0.4), labels[i], font_size=10, bold=True, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    add_footer(slide, 15)

def slide_17_risk_trends(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, (WHITE))
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Risk Trend Analysis"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.3), Inches(10), Inches(0.6),
                     "Risk Trend Analysis", font_size=28, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_COLOR)

    chart_data = {
        'categories': ['Q1', 'Q2', 'Q3', 'Q4'],
        'series': [
            ('Financial Risk Index', [70, 68, 72, 75]),
            ('Operational Risk Index', [60, 55, 50, 45]),
            ('Compliance Risk Index', [55, 52, 50, 48]),
        ]
    }

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.LINE_MARKERS, Inches(1.0), Inches(1.2), Inches(11.3), Inches(4.5),
        _build_category_chart(chart_data))
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    if chart.has_title:
        chart.chart_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].text = "Composite Risk Index by Quarter"
        chart.chart_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(12)

    plot = chart.plots[0]
    for series in plot.series:
        series.format.line.width = Pt(2.5)
        series.has_data_labels = True
        series.data_labels.font.size = Pt(8)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(6.0), Inches(11), Inches(0.4),
                 "Overall risk index trending downward; Financial risk requires attention", font_size=12, bold=True, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    add_footer(slide, 17)

        ("Medium Priority", "Expand cybersecurity training to all staff"),
        ("Low Priority", "Review and update vendor risk assessment process"),
    ]

    for i, (priority, action) in enumerate(recs):
        x = Inches(0.8)
        y = Inches(1.2 + i * 1.15)
        color = RISK_RED if priority == "High Priority" else (RISK_AMBER if priority == "Medium Priority" else RISK_GREEN)
        add_card(slide, x, y, Inches(11.7), Inches(0.95), action, priority, LIGHT_GRAY, color)

def slide_24_timeline(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, (WHITE))
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Next Steps & Implementation Timeline"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.3), Inches(10), Inches(0.6),
                     "Next Steps & Implementation Timeline", font_size=28, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_COLOR)

    timeline = [
        ("Q1 2025", "Deploy advanced threat detection system"),
        ("Q1 2025", "Complete GDPR compliance remediation"),
        ("Q2 2025", "Launch automated risk monitoring platform"),
        ("Q2 2025", "Expand cybersecurity training program"),
        ("Q3 2025", "Review vendor risk assessment process"),
        ("Q4 2025", "Conduct FY2025 Risk Assessment kickoff"),
    ]

    for i, (period, action) in enumerate(timeline):
        x = Inches(0.8 + i * 2.1)
        y = Inches(1.3)
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, x, y, Inches(1.5), Inches(1.5))
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_COLOR
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.1), y + Inches(0.2), Inches(1.3), Inches(0.4),
                     period, font_size=11, bold=True, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    for i in range(len(timeline) - 1):
        x = Inches(2.3 + i * 2.1)
        y = Inches(2.0)
        line_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RIGHT_ARROW, x, y, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.2))
        line_shape.fill.solid()
        line_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = MEDIUM_GRAY

    for i, (period, action) in enumerate(timeline):
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8 + i * 2.1), Inches(3.5), Inches(2.0), Inches(2.5),
                     action, font_size=11, bold=False, color=DARK_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, 24)

    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, (PRIMARY_COLOR))
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.5), Inches(2.0), Inches(8.3), Inches(1.0),
                 "Thank You", font_size=40, bold=True, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.5), Inches(3.2), Inches(8.3), Inches(0.6),
                 "Questions & Discussion", font_size=22, bold=False, color=ACCENT_COLOR, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.5), Inches(4.5), Inches(8.3), Inches(0.5),
                 "Risk & Compliance Division | FY 2024 Annual Report", font_size=14, bold=False, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(5.5), Inches(3.8), Inches(2.3), Inches(0.06))
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_COLOR

    add_footer(slide, 25)


def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    slide_01_title(prs)
    slide_02_executive_summary(prs)
    slide_03_agenda(prs)
    slide_04_methodology(prs)
    slide_05_framework(prs)
    slide_06_regulatory(prs)
    slide_07_categories(prs)
    slide_08_financial_risks(prs)
    slide_09_financial_trends(prs)
    slide_10_operational_risks(prs)
    slide_11_operational_trends(prs)
    slide_12_compliance_risks(prs)
    slide_13_cybersecurity(prs)
    slide_14_market_risks(prs)
    slide_15_heat_map(prs)
    slide_16_risk_register(prs)
    slide_17_risk_trends(prs)
    slide_18_mitigation(prs)
    slide_19_kpi_table(prs)
    slide_20_kpi_dashboard(prs)
    slide_21_training_metrics(prs)
    slide_22_incident_summary(prs)
    slide_23_recommendations(prs)
    slide_24_timeline(prs)
    slide_25_thank_you(prs)

    prs.save("Risk_Assessment.pptx")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
